question: Field technicians on T-003 reported intermittent partial discharge symptoms during their last inspection. Identify the failure mode that best matches this symptom and list the sensor readings most useful for confirming and tracking its progression.
answer: To confirm and track the progression of the partial discharge, we recommend monitoring the DGA readings of sensors for Dissolved Hydrogen (H2) and Methane (CH4).

output.name: Partial Discharge
output.recommended_action: Monitor closely; schedule inspection within 90 days

output.name: Partial Discharge
output.description: Low-energy electrical discharge within insulation voids. Indicated by elevated H2 and CH4 with trace C2H2.
